translations.de: Ganz ehrlich, das ist eine Revolution.
translations.tr: Dürüstçe söylemek gerekirse, bu bir devrim.
translations.vi: Thật lòng mà nói, đây là một cuộc cách mạng.
translations.nl: Eerlijk gezegd, dit is een revolutie.
translations.hi: सच कहूँ तो, यह एक क्रांति है।
translations.nb: Ærlig talt, dette er en revolusjon.
translations.sv: Ärligt talat, det är en revolution.
translations.da: Ærligt talt, det er en revolution.

tokens.explanation: Sentence/discourse adverb expressing the speaker’s stance ('frankly').
Fused clitic pronoun 'c’' (ce) + copular auxiliary 'est'; functions as the copula linking subject to predicate.
Indefinite article, feminine singular, introducing the predicate noun.
Common noun, feminine; here a predicate nominal.

sentences.target: Tu parles de révolution tous les jours.
sentences.reading: /ty paʁl də ʁe.vɔ.ly.sjɔ̃ tu le ʒuʁ/

translations.fr: Tu parles de révolution tous les jours.
translations.ipa: /ty paʁl də ʁe.vɔ.ly.sjɔ̃ tu le ʒuʁ/
translations.en: You talk about revolution every day.
translations.es: Hablas de revolución todos los días.
translations.de: Du sprichst jeden Tag von einer Revolution.
translations.ru: Ты каждый день говоришь о революции.
translations.pt: Você fala de revolução todos os dias.
translations.he: אתה מדבר על מהפכה כל יום.
translations.vi: Bạn nói về cách mạng mỗi ngày.
translations.ar: أنت تتحدث عن الثورة كل يوم.
translations.nl: Je praat elke dag over revolutie.
translations.hi: तुम हर दिन क्रांति के बारे में बात करते हो।
translations.nb: Du snakker om revolusjon hver dag.
translations.id: Kamu bicara tentang revolusi setiap hari.
translations.sv: Du pratar om revolution varje dag.
translations.ro: Vorbești despre revoluție în fiecare zi.
translations.da: Du taler om revolution hver dag.
translations.ja: 君は毎日革命について話している。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular subject pronoun.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular.
Preposition introducing the complement 'révolution'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'de'.
Quantifier determiner modifying 'jours' in the fixed temporal expression 'tous les jours' ('every day').
Definite article, plural, with 'jours'.
Plural common noun; head of the temporal NP.

sentences.target: On attend la révolution dans les transports.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ atɑ̃ la ʁe.vɔ.ly.sjɔ̃ dɑ̃ le tʁɑ̃spɔʁ/

translations.fr: On attend la révolution dans les transports.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ atɑ̃ la ʁe.vɔ.ly.sjɔ̃ dɑ̃ le tʁɑ̃spɔʁ/
translations.en: We’re waiting for a revolution in transport.
translations.es: Estamos esperando una revolución en el transporte.
translations.de: Wir warten auf eine Revolution im Verkehr.
translations.ko: 우리는 교통에 혁명이 오길 기다리고 있어.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在等待交通领域的革命。
translations.pt: Estamos esperando uma revolução no transporte.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang chờ một cuộc cách mạng trong giao thông.
translations.nl: We wachten op een revolutie in het vervoer.
translations.uk: Ми чекаємо на революцію в транспорті.
translations.hi: हम परिवहन में एक क्रांति का इंतजार कर रहे हैं।
translations.nb: Vi venter på en revolusjon i transporten.
translations.sv: Vi väntar på en revolution i transporten.
translations.da: Vi venter på en revolution i transporten.
translations.ja: 私たちは交通の革命を待っている。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite pronoun used as a subject, often meaning 'we' in colloquial French.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Definite article, feminine singular, with 'révolution'.
Common noun; direct object of 'attend'.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article, plural, with 'transports'.
Plural common noun; complement of 'dans' referring to the transportation sector.

sentences.target: Cette cafetière, c'est la révolution au bureau.
sentences.reading: /sɛt ka.fɛ.tjɛʁ sɛ la ʁe.vɔ.ly.sjɔ̃ o byʁo/

translations.fr: Cette cafetière, c'est la révolution au bureau.
translations.ipa: /sɛt ka.fɛ.tjɛʁ sɛ la ʁe.vɔ.ly.sjɔ̃ o byʁo/
translations.en: This coffee maker is a revolution at the office.
translations.es: Esta cafetera es una revolución en la oficina.
translations.de: Diese Kaffeemaschine ist eine Revolution im Büro.
translations.it: Questa macchina del caffè è una rivoluzione in ufficio.
translations.zh-Hans: 这台咖啡机是办公室的一场革命。
translations.yue: 呢部咖啡機係辦公室嘅一場革命。
translations.pt: Esta cafeteira é uma revolução no escritório.
translations.he: המכונת קפה הזאת היא מהפכה במשרד.
translations.tr: Bu kahve makinesi ofiste bir devrim.
translations.vi: Máy pha cà phê này là một cuộc cách mạng ở văn phòng.
translations.ar: هذه ماكينة القهوة هي ثورة في المكتب.
translations.nl: Deze koffiemachine is een revolutie op kantoor.
translations.hu: Ez a kávéfőző forradalom az irodában.
translations.hi: यह कॉफी मशीन ऑफिस में एक क्रांति है।
translations.pl: Ten ekspres do kawy to rewolucja w biurze.
translations.el: Αυτή η καφετιέρα είναι επανάσταση στο γραφείο.
translations.nb: Denne kaffemaskinen er en revolusjon på kontoret.
translations.id: Mesin kopi ini adalah revolusi di kantor.
translations.sv: Den här kaffemaskinen är en revolution på kontoret.
translations.ro: Această cafetieră este o revoluție la birou.
translations.cs: Tento kávovar je revoluce v kanceláři.
translations.da: Denne kaffemaskine er en revolution på kontoret.
translations.ja: このコーヒーメーカーはオフィスの革命だ。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular, modifying 'cafetière'.
Feminine common noun; topic/fronted NP.
Fused clitic pronoun 'c’' (ce) + copular auxiliary 'est'; introduces an equative/predicative assertion.
Definite article, feminine singular, with 'révolution'.
Common noun; predicate nominal.
Contraction of 'à + le'; preposition heading the locative phrase 'au bureau'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'au' indicating location.
